title: Recover Service Arquebus
hook: Flint still has reason to recover his service arquebus from the Shieldmarshal armory.
playerSummary: Getting the arquebus back may require stealth, leverage, favors, or a dangerous amount of trust.
gmTruth: Use this as a practical prep thread with infiltration, negotiations, or trust tests around the armory and anyone who might help Flint reclaim what was taken from him.
